data.body: AC amendment: Use ticket-lib.sh _flock_stage_commit helper (or source the lib) instead of raw fcntl.flock. ticket-lib.sh already encapsulates the full flock acquire → atomic rename → git add → git commit cycle with retry logic, exit-code handling, and gc.auto=0 guards. Re-implementing inline risks divergence from the flock contract. Lock scope must cover the ENTIRE archive batch (all git mv operations + commit) and ENTIRE prune batch (all git rm + commit) — two lock acquisitions total, not per-file.
